name: Ultimate Caramel Nut Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease a foil-lined 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
3. Microwave the chocolate squares and butter on high for 2 minutes, or until the butter is melted. Stir until the chocolate is completely melted.
4. Stir the sugar into the chocolate mixture until well blended. Mix in the eggs. Stir in the flour.
5. Spread half of the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the batter is firm to the touch.
7. Meanwhile, microwave the caramels and cream on high for 3 minutes, or until the caramels begin to melt. Whisk until smooth. Stir in the pecans. Gently spread the caramel mixture over the brownie batter in the pan. Sprinkle with chocolate chips, if desired.
8. Pour the remaining unbaked brownie batter evenly over the caramel mixture. Sprinkle with the remaining nuts (some caramel mixture may peak through).
9. Bake for an additional 30 minutes. Allow to cool in the pan.
10. Run a knife around the edge of the pan to loosen the brownies from the sides. Lift out of the pan using the foil as handle.
11. Cut into 24 pieces.
